response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings extensive fullstack experience across multiple domains, with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React proficiency, as well as relational database familiarity. His work on scalable platforms, including a Geo-Data platform deployed on Kubernetes, aligns well with the renewable energy platform's needs. However, his recent roles skew toward senior/staff levels, and his lack of explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience may require validation. His collaborative approach and focus on clean architecture are clear strengths.
strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple industries
Proven ability to build and deploy scalable systems, including Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure (AWS)
Strong collaboration skills and focus on testable, well-architected code with pragmatic solutions
concerns: Lacks explicit PostgreSQL experience, despite relational database familiarity
Recent roles emphasize senior/staff responsibilities, which may not align with entry/mid-level expectations
No direct mention of Nest.js experience, though React and Node.js are well-covered

key_factors.factor: Scalable platform and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes)
Senior-level experience in recent roles vs. entry/mid-level role
